Thanks for taking a moment to share feedback. This helps improve the app for kids.

Please **do not include your child's name, school name, or any other personal information.**

---

## Grade Band

<!-- Which grade are the students in? -->

- [ ] Kindergarten
- [ ] Grade 1
- [ ] Grade 2
- [ ] Grade 3 or above

## What Worked Well?

<!-- What did the kids enjoy or understand easily? -->

## What Didn't Work?

<!-- What was confusing, frustrating, or just didn't land? -->

## Anything You'd Change?

<!-- Optional: a specific suggestion, however small. -->

## Context

<!-- Optional: How did you use the app — at home, in class, small group, one-on-one? -->
